name: voice-channel
description: Voice agent integration for SoY. Answers phone calls via Vapi, books appointments against SoY's calendar, captures transcripts into the data graph. Per-install tenancy — one SoY install serves one business.
standalone_features: Inbound voice agent answering via Vapi
Tool calls into SoY contacts, calendar, and services data
Automatic contact creation from first-time callers
Post-call booking verification with Telegram alerts on failure
Hard call duration, rate limit, and daily cost cap safety rails
Per-install tenancy — one SoY = one business

features: Caller lookup and relationship context injection
New callers auto-create contacts with lead source tracking
enhancements.description: When a caller phone number matches an existing contact, the voice agent greets them with relationship context (last conversation, open projects, trajectory).

features: Bookings link to active projects by client contact
enhancements.description: Appointments booked by voice automatically associate with active projects for the calling client.
Caller phone number matching uses contacts discovered from Gmail history.

features: Automatic commitment extraction from voice transcripts
Talk ratio and coaching analysis on voice calls
Voice calls flow into the unified transcript timeline
enhancements.description: Post-call transcripts are analyzed by conversation-intelligence for commitments, talk patterns, and coaching notes — same pipeline as meeting transcripts.

external_services.name: vapi
external_services.description: Hosted voice agent platform. Handles Twilio transport, STT, LLM, TTS, turn-taking, and interruption. Requires account + API key + configured agent.

external_services.name: twilio
external_services.description: Phone number provisioning. Vapi can provision numbers for you or bring-your-own.
